message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Confirmed scope, ready for UX review">
Thanks Steve. Confirmed -- Step 9 is scoped strictly to inbox -> waiting for clarification. The deferred item is tracked in `docs/deferred-items.md`. Also, the announce text "Moved to Waiting For" follows your earlier UX guidance.

Implementation is complete with all tests passing. Ready for your review if you'd like to check the UX flow -- the route handler is in `src/routes/inbox.rs` (search for `waiting_for` branch) and the template is `templates/inbox_item.html`.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Already reviewed and approved. My detailed UX review was sent in my previous message -- all seven points checked out. You have my consensus.
